justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes. AC5 idempotency is distinctly handled from AC2 conflict check — same email skips both findByEmail and updateEmail. No external validation library used (simple regex). Tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to specific tests. files_changed lists handler and test files.

observations.text: AC5 handled correctly and distinctly from AC2 — same email returns 200 without calling updateEmail or findByEmail
AC3 uses simple regex validation, no external library introduced
All 5 ACs have explicit test names in acceptance_criteria_coverage
Guard ordering test is a valuable addition beyond the spec
Deviations section correctly documents the AC5 optimization of skipping findByEmail
Dual JS/TS implementations were not requested — adds unnecessary file count, though does not violate any rubric criteria
